item.title: joshpearson180: Josh @joshpearson180 · 12s Why has this silly tweet about screw in darts points blown up Cita Josh @joshpearson180 · 21h
item.description: Josh @joshpearson180 · 12s Why has this silly tweet about screw in darts points blown up Cita Josh @joshpearson180 · 21h Even football boots are getting Swiss point converted now 0:28

item.title:
Oche180: Oche180 @Oche180 · 11min Mickey Mansell has averaged a ton to dump out Rob Cross and move into the second round.
The Ir
item.description:
Oche180 @Oche180 · 11min Mickey Mansell has averaged a ton to dump out Rob Cross and move into the second round.
The Irishman revealed he changed his darts just before the match and it seemed to inspire him to a great performance.
He'll face Stephen Bunting tomorrow.
In association with Mostrar más 55

item.title:
OfficialPDC: PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 12min MANSELL DUMPS OUT VOLTAGE!
Mickey Mansell produces the performance of the afternoon so
item.description:
PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 12min MANSELL DUMPS OUT VOLTAGE!
Mickey Mansell produces the performance of the afternoon so far, averaging 100.32 to beat Rob Cross 6-2 - solid stuff from the Irishman!
http:// bit.ly/PDCTVLive #ET5 2 1 20 3 mil

item.title:
livedarts: Live Darts @livedarts · 13min 𝗠𝗔𝗡𝗦𝗘𝗟𝗟 𝗛𝗔𝗟𝗧𝗦 𝗩𝗢𝗟𝗧𝗔𝗚𝗘
Mickey Mansell averages 100.3 with 55% on the doubles in a dominan
item.description:
Live Darts @livedarts · 13min 𝗠𝗔𝗡𝗦𝗘𝗟𝗟 𝗛𝗔𝗟𝗧𝗦 𝗩𝗢𝗟𝗧𝗔𝗚𝗘
Mickey Mansell averages 100.3 with 55% on the doubles in a dominant 6-2 victory over former World Champion Rob Cross in round one Mickey Mansell 2 500
